29431.authors: Janice C. Eberly, Jonathan Haskel, Paul Mizen
29431.abstract: The impact of an economic shock depends both on its severity and the resilience of the economic response. Resilience can include the ability to relocate factors, for example, even when new technologies or skills are not yet at the ready. This resilience per se buffers production and has an economic value, which we estimate. The COVID-19 pandemic caused a widespread decline in recorded GDP. Yet, as catastrophic as the collapse was, it was buffered by an unprecedented and spontaneous deployment of what we call “Potential Capital,” the dwelling/residential capital and connective technologies used alongside working from home. Together potential capital and labor working from home provided additional output margins and capacity. We estimate the contribution of this capital, and the remote work that it facilitated, to have roughly halved the decline in GDP in the US reducing the fall in GDP to 9.4 log points in 2020Q2 at the trough of the recession. Similar effects are seen in the 6 OECD countries for which data are available, output fell by 14 log points, but would have fallen by 26 log points had only workplace inputs been available. Accounting for the contribution of “Potential Capital” also revises downwards estimated total productivity gains in the business sector during the pandemic from 8 log points to 5 log points in 2020Q2. We also find an output elasticity of domestic non-dwellings capital to be similar to that of workplace ICT capital, reflecting its role as productive capital. Turning to the future, changes in working from home depend upon relative costs, relative technologies and, crucially, the elasticity of substitution between home and work tasks. We estimate that that elasticity to be more than unity, meaning that the growth of ICT will raise the share of work done remotely.

29408.title: Preemptive Entry and Technology Diffusion: The Market for Drive-in Theaters
29408.zh_title: 先发进入与技术扩散：汽车影院市场
29408.authors: Ricard Gil, Jean-François Houde, Shilong Sun, Yuya Takahashi
29408.abstract: This paper studies the role and incidence of entry preemption strategic motives on the dynamics of new industries, while providing an empirical test for entry preemption, and quantifying its impact on market structure. The empirical context is the evolution of the U.S. drive-in theater market between 1945 and 1957. We exploit a robust prediction of dynamic entry games to test for preemption incentives: the deterrence effect of entering early is only relevant for firms in markets of intermediate size. Potential entrants in small and large markets face little uncertainty about the actual number of firms that will eventually enter. This leads to a non-monotonic relationship between market size and the probability of observing an early entrant. We find robust empirical support for this prediction using a large cross-section of markets. We then estimate the parameters of a dynamic entry game that matches the reduced-form prediction and quantify the strength of the preemption incentive. Our counterfactual analysis shows that strategic motives can increase the number of early entrants by as much as 50 percent in mid-size markets without affecting the number of firms in the long run. By causing firms to enter the market too early, we show that strategic entry preemption leads on average to a 5% increase in entry costs and a 1% decrease in firms’ expected value (relative to an environment without strategic investments).
29408.zh_abstract: 本文研究了先发进入的战略动机在新行业动态中的作用和发生率，同时为先发进入提供了实证检验，并量化了其对市场结构的影响。实证背景是1945年至1957年间美国汽车影院市场的演变。我们利用动态进入博弈的一个稳健预测来检验先发激励：早期进入的威慑效应仅对中等规模市场的企业相关。小规模和大规模市场的潜在进入者对最终将进入的实际企业数量面临较小的不确定性。这导致市场规模与观察到早期进入者的概率之间存在非单调关系。我们利用大量市场横截面数据发现了对这一预测的稳健实证支持。然后，我们估计了一个动态进入博弈的参数，该博弈匹配了简化形式的预测，并量化了先发激励的强度。我们的反事实分析表明，战略动机可以使中等规模市场的早期进入者数量增加多达50%，而不会影响长期内的企业数量。通过导致企业过早进入市场，我们表明战略性的先发进入平均使进入成本增加5%，并使企业预期价值下降1%（相对于没有战略投资的环境）。

29407.title: Mental Health Therapy as a Core Strategy for Increasing Human Capital: Evidence from Ghana
29407.zh_title: 心理健康治疗作为增加人力资本的核心策略：来自加纳的证据
29407.authors: Nathan Barker, Gharad T. Bryan, Dean Karlan, Angela Ofori-Atta, Christopher R. Udry
29407.abstract: We study the impact of cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) for individuals selected from the general population of poor households in rural Ghana. Results from 2-3 months after a randomized intervention show strong impacts on mental and physical health, cognitive and socioemotional skills, and downstream economic outcomes. We find no evidence of heterogeneity by baseline mental distress; we argue that this is because CBT can improve human capital for a general population of poor individuals through two pathways. First, CBT reduces vulnerability to deteriorating mental health; and second, CBT directly improves bandwidth, increasing cognitive and socioemotional skills and hence economic outcomes.
29407.zh_abstract: 我们研究了针对加纳农村贫困家庭一般人群中选出的个体进行认知行为疗法（CBT）的影响。随机干预后2-3个月的结果显示，CBT对心理健康、身体健康、认知和社会情感技能以及下游经济结果产生了强烈影响。我们没有发现基于基线心理困扰的异质性证据；我们认为这是因为CBT可以通过两条途径改善贫困个体一般人群的人力资本。首先，CBT降低了对心理健康恶化的脆弱性；其次，CBT直接改善了认知带宽，增加了认知和社会情感技能，从而改善了经济结果。
29407.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, H00, I0, I00, I3, J0, J01, J10, J21, J24, O0, O1, O10

29406.title: Market Segmentation and Competition in Health Insurance
29406.zh_title: 健康保险中的市场分割与竞争
29406.authors: Michael J. Dickstein, Kate Ho, Nathaniel D. Mark
29406.abstract: In the United States, households obtain health insurance through distinct market segments. To explore the economics of this segmentation, we consider the effects of pooling coverage provided through small employers and through the individual marketplace. We model households’ demand for insurance coverage and health care, along with insurers’ price-setting, to predict equilibrium choices, premiums, and health spending. Applying our model to data from Oregon, we find that pooling can both mitigate adverse selection in the individual market and benefit small group households without raising taxpayer costs: premiums in the individual market fall 11% for the most chosen plan type and consumers in both segments gain surplus. Our estimates provide insight into the effects of new regulations that allow employers to shift coverage to the individual market.
29406.zh_abstract: 在美国，家庭通过不同的市场细分获得健康保险。为了探讨这种分割的经济学含义，我们考虑了将小雇主提供的保险和个人市场提供的保险合并的效果。我们对家庭对保险覆盖和医疗保健的需求以及保险公司的定价进行建模，以预测均衡选择、保费和医疗支出。将我们的模型应用于俄勒冈州的数据，我们发现合并既可以缓解个人市场中的逆向选择，也可以使小团体家庭受益，而不会增加纳税人成本：对于最常选择的计划类型，个人市场的保费下降11%，两个细分市场的消费者都获得了剩余。我们的估计为允许雇主将保险覆盖转移到个人市场的新法规的影响提供了见解。

29405.title: The Marginal Value of Public Pension Wealth: Evidence from Border House Prices
29405.zh_title: 公共养老金财富的边际价值：来自边境房价的证据
29405.authors: Darren Aiello, Asaf Bernstein, Mahyar Kargar, Ryan Lewis, Michael Schwert
29405.abstract: We study effects of state pension windfalls on property prices near state borders, where theory suggests real estate reflects the value of additional public resources. Windfalls have grown to half the size of total state tax revenues and provide plausibly well-identified variation in fiscal conditions. We find one dollar of exogenous variation in pension asset returns increases border house prices by approximately two dollars. These estimates suggest governments, rather than wasting incremental resources, allocate additional funds towards high value projects or tax abatement. Evidence of larger effects in financially constrained municipalities highlight how fiscal resources amplify welfare effects of economic shocks.
29405.zh_abstract: 我们研究了州养老金意外收益对州边界附近房产价格的影响，理论上认为房地产反映了额外公共资源的价值。这些意外收益已增长到州总税收收入的一半，并提供了看似合理且可识别的财政状况变化。我们发现，养老金资产回报的一美元外生变化会使边境房价增加约两美元。这些估计表明，政府并没有浪费增量资源，而是将额外资金分配给了高价值项目或税收减免。在财政受限的市政当局中观察到更大效应的证据，突显了财政资源如何放大经济冲击的福利效应。
29405.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, PE, POL；JEL：H41, H55, H74, R30

29404.title: The Economic Consequences of the Opium War
29404.abstract: This paper employs new data to study the impact of Western colonial institutions on China’s economy during the 19th century. It is shown that trade and legal institutions in the treaty port areas accelerated industrialization and increased capital market efficiency. The former was driven by technology transfer and market access gains at the ports, while the latter was due to increased security through extraterritorial legal rule at the consular courts. Furthermore, a geographic spillover analysis demonstrates that even though the number of foreign places was relatively small, the Western impact was substantial because it radiated far from the ports and affected most of the country. At the same time, the West’s intervention harmed China’s economy by increasing protest activity organized by secret societies, thereby reducing Qing state capacity. A picture emerges according to which the West’s intervention had a major impact that is neither all-favorable nor all-unfavorable.
29404.zh_abstract: 本文利用新数据研究了19世纪西方殖民制度对中国经济的影响。研究表明，通商口岸地区的贸易和法律制度加速了工业化并提高了资本市场效率。前者是由港口的技术转让和市场准入收益驱动的，而后者则是由于领事法庭的治外法权规则增加了安全性。此外，地理溢出分析表明，尽管外国场所数量相对较少，但西方的影响是巨大的，因为它从港口辐射到远方，影响了国家的大部分地区。同时，西方的干预通过增加秘密社团组织的抗议活动，削弱了清朝的国家能力，从而损害了中国经济。由此呈现的画面是，西方的干预产生了重大影响，既非完全有利，也非完全不利。
29404.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, POL；JEL：F63, G10, N25, O11

29403.title: Financial Incentives and Other Nudges Do Not Increase COVID-19 Vaccinations among the Vaccine Hesitant
29403.zh_title: 经济激励和其他助推措施并未提高疫苗犹豫人群的新冠疫苗接种率
29403.authors: Tom Chang, Mireille Jacobson, Manisha Shah, Rajiv Pramanik, Samir B. Shah
29403.abstract: Can financial incentives, public health messages and other behavioral nudges –approaches deployed by state and local governments, employers, and health systems – increase SARS-CoV-2 vaccination rates among the vaccine hesitant in the US? In mid-2021, we randomly assigned unvaccinated members of a Medicaid managed care health plan to $\$10$ or $\$50$ financial incentives, different public health messages, a simple appointment scheduler, or control to assess impacts on SARS-CoV-2 vaccination intentions and vaccine uptake within 30 days of intervention. While messages increased vaccination intentions, none of the treatments increased overall vaccination rates. Consistent with backlash concerns, financial incentives and negative messages decreased vaccination rates for some subgroups. Financial incentives and other behavioral nudges do not meaningfully increase SARS-CoV-2 vaccination rates amongst the vaccine hesitant.
29403.zh_abstract: 经济激励、公共卫生信息和其他行为助推措施——这些由州和地方政府、雇主及卫生系统部署的方法——能否提高美国疫苗犹豫人群的SARS-CoV-2疫苗接种率？在2021年中期，我们将一个医疗补助管理式医疗健康计划中未接种疫苗的成员随机分配到10美元或50美元的经济激励、不同的公共卫生信息、一个简单的预约安排器或对照组，以评估这些措施对SARS-CoV-2疫苗接种意愿和干预后30天内疫苗接受率的影响。虽然信息增加了接种意愿，但没有一种处理措施提高了总体接种率。与反弹担忧一致，经济激励和负面信息降低了一些亚组的接种率。经济激励和其他行为助推措施并未有意义地提高疫苗犹豫人群的SARS-CoV-2疫苗接种率。

29402.title: Policy Experimentation in China: the Political Economy of Policy Learning
29402.zh_title: 中国的政策试验：政策学习的政治经济学
29402.abstract: Many governments have engaged in policy experimentation in various forms to resolve uncertainty and facilitate learning. However, little is understood about the characteristics of policy experimentation, and how the structure of experimentation may affect policy learning and policy outcomes. We aim to describe and understand China’s policy experimentation since 1980, among the largest and most systematic in recent history. We collect comprehensive data on policy experimentation conducted in China over the past four decades. We find three main results. First, more than 80% of the experiments exhibit positive sample selection in terms of a locality’s economic development, and much of this can be attributed to misaligned incentives across political hierarchies. Second, local politicians allocate more resources to ensure the experiments’ success, and such effort is not replicable when policies roll out to the entire country. Third, the presence of sample selection and strategic effort is not fully accounted for by the central government, thus affecting policy learning and distorting national policies originating from the experimentation. Taken together, these results suggest that while China’s bureaucratic and institutional conditions make policy experimentation at such scale possible, the complex political environments can also limit the scope and bias the direction of policy learning.
29402.zh_abstract: 许多政府以各种形式进行政策试验，以解决不确定性和促进学习。然而，人们对政策试验的特征以及试验结构如何影响政策学习和政策结果知之甚少。我们旨在描述和理解中国自1980年以来的政策试验，这是近代历史上规模最大、最系统的试验之一。我们收集了过去四十年中国进行的政策试验的全面数据。我们发现了三个主要结果。首先，超过80%的试验在地方经济发展方面表现出正向样本选择，这在很大程度上可归因于政治层级间的激励错位。其次，地方政治家分配更多资源以确保试验成功，而这种努力在政策推广到全国时是不可复制的。第三，中央政府并未充分考虑样本选择和战略努力的存在，从而影响了政策学习并扭曲了源自试验的国家政策。综合来看，这些结果表明，尽管中国的官僚和制度条件使如此大规模的政策试验成为可能，但复杂的政治环境也可能限制政策学习的范围并使其方向产生偏差。
29402.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D72, D8, O2, P16, P21

29401.title: On the Persistence of the China Shock
29401.authors: David Autor, David Dorn, Gordon H. Hanson
29401.abstract: Abstract We evaluate the duration of the China trade shock and its impact on a wide range of outcomes over the period 2000 to 2019. The shock plateaued in 2010, enabling analysis of its effects for nearly a decade past its culmination. Adverse impacts of import competition on manufacturing employment, overall employment-population ratios, and income per capita in more trade-exposed U.S. commuting zones are present out to 2019. Over the full study period, greater import competition implies a reduction in the manufacturing employment-population ratio of 1.54 percentage points, which is 55% of the observed change in the value, and the absorption of 86% of this net job loss via a corresponding decrease in the overall employment rate. Reductions in population headcounts, which indicate net out-migration, register only for foreign-born workers and the native-born 25-39 years old, implying that exit from work is a primary means of adjustment to trade-induced contractions in labor demand. More negatively affected regions see modest increases in the uptake of government transfers, but these transfers primarily take the form of Social Security and Medicare benefits. Adverse outcomes are more acute in regions that initially had fewer college-educated workers and were more industrially specialized. Impacts are qualitatively—but not quantitatively—similar to those caused by the decline of employment in coal production since the 1980s, indicating that the China trade shock holds lessons for other episodes of localized job loss. Import competition from China induced changes in income per capita across local labor markets that are much larger than the spatial heterogeneity of income effects predicted by standard quantitative trade models. Even using higher-end estimates of the consumer benefits of rising trade with China, a substantial fraction of commuting zones appears to have suffered absolute declines in average real incomes.
29401.zh_abstract: 我们评估了中国贸易冲击的持续时间及其在2000年至2019年期间对一系列结果的影响。冲击在2010年趋于平稳，从而能够分析其影响在达到顶峰后近十年的情况。在贸易暴露程度更高的美国通勤区，进口竞争对制造业就业、总体就业人口比率和人均收入的不利影响一直持续到2019年。在整个研究期间，更大的进口竞争意味着制造业就业人口比率下降1.54个百分点，这占观察到的该数值变化的55%，并且这些净失业的86%通过总体就业率的相应下降而被吸收。人口数量的减少（表明净迁出）仅在外籍工人和25-39岁的本土出生工人中记录到，这意味着退出工作是应对贸易引发的劳动力需求收缩的主要调整方式。受到更负面影响的地区，政府转移支付的接受有所增加，但这些转移支付主要采取社会保障和医疗保险福利的形式。在最初大学毕业生较少且产业专业化程度更高的地区，不利结果更为严重。这些影响在性质上——但非数量上——与自1980年代以来煤炭生产就业下降所造成的影响相似，表明中国贸易冲击为其他局部失业事件提供了教训。来自中国的进口竞争在地方劳动力市场之间引发了人均收入的变化，这些变化远大于标准定量贸易模型所预测的收入效应的空间异质性。即使使用对与中国贸易增长带来的消费者收益的高端估计，仍有相当一部分通勤区的平均实际收入似乎出现了绝对下降。
29401.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：E24, F16, J23, J31, R12, R23

29400.title: The Rise of Pass-Throughs and the Decline of the Labor Share
29400.zh_title: 穿透型企业的兴起与劳动份额的下降
29400.authors: Matthew Smith, Danny Yagan, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
29400.abstract: This paper studies the coevolution of the fall in the US corporate sector labor share and the rise of business activity in tax-preferred, pass-through form. Reallocating activity to the form it would have taken prior to the Tax Reform Act of 1986 accounts for one third of the decline in the corporate sector labor share between 1978 and 2017. Our adjustments are concentrated among mid-market firms in services, leaving a larger role for the manufacturing sector and superstar firms in driving the remaining decline in the labor share. Our findings highlight the importance of tax policy when measuring factor shares.
29400.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国企业部门劳动份额下降与税收优惠的穿透型企业形式中商业活动兴起之间的共同演变。将商业活动重新配置到其在1986年《税收改革法案》之前本应采取的形式，解释了1978年至2017年间企业部门劳动份额下降的三分之一。我们的调整集中在服务业的中端市场企业，这使得制造业部门和超级明星企业在推动劳动份额剩余下降中发挥了更大作用。我们的发现强调了在衡量要素份额时税收政策的重要性。
29400.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E01, E25, H25, J32

29444.title: Risks and global supply chains: What we know and what we need to know
29444.zh_title: 风险与全球供应链：已知与未知
29444.abstract: Recent supply disruptions catapulted the issue of risk in global supply chains (GSCs) to the top of policy agendas and created the impression that shortages would have been less severe if GSCs were either shorter and more domestic, or more diversified. But is this right? We start our answer by reviewing studies that look at risks to and from GSCs, and how GSCs have recovered from past shocks. We then look at whether GSCs are too risky—starting with business research on how firms approach the cost-resiliency trade-off. We propose the risk-versus-reward framework from portfolio theory as a good way to evaluate whether anti-risk policy is justified. We then discuss how exposures to foreign shocks are measured and argue that exposure is higher than direct indicators imply. Finally, we consider the future of GSCs in the light of current policy proposals and advancing technology before pointing to the rich menu of topics for future research on the risk-GSC nexus.
29444.zh_abstract: 近期的供应中断将全球供应链中的风险问题推至政策议程的首位，并造成一种印象：如果全球供应链更短、更本土化或更多元化，短缺本不会如此严重。但这是正确的吗？我们首先回顾了研究全球供应链面临的风险及其带来的风险，以及全球供应链如何从过去的冲击中恢复。接着，我们探讨全球供应链是否风险过高——从企业如何权衡成本与韧性的商业研究入手。我们提出投资组合理论中的风险与回报框架，作为评估反风险政策是否合理的一种有效方式。然后，我们讨论如何衡量对外部冲击的暴露程度，并认为这种暴露程度高于直接指标所暗示的水平。最后，在指出未来关于风险与全球供应链关系研究的丰富课题之前，我们结合当前政策提案和技术进步，展望了全球供应链的未来。
29444.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：F10, F13, F14, F15, F23

29443.title: Bad Lighting: Effects of Youth Indoor Tanning Prohibitions
29443.zh_title: 不良光照：青少年室内日光浴禁令的影响
29443.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Brandyn F. Churchill, Michelle M. Marcus
29443.abstract: Indoor tanning beds (ITBs) emit UV light at high intensity and have been classified as carcinogenic to humans by the World Health Organization since 2009. We are the first to study the role of state laws prohibiting youths from indoor tanning using a difference-in-differences research design. We find that youth ITB prohibitions reduced population search intensity for tanning-related information. Among white teen girls, ITB prohibitions reduced self-reported indoor tanning and increased sun protective behaviors. We also find that youth ITB prohibitions significantly reduced the size of the indoor tanning market by increasing tanning salon closures and reducing tanning salon sales.
29443.zh_abstract: 室内日光浴床以高强度发射紫外线，自2009年起被世界卫生组织列为对人类致癌物。我们首次采用双重差分研究设计，研究禁止青少年进行室内日光浴的州法律的作用。我们发现，青少年室内日光浴禁令降低了人群对日光浴相关信息的搜索强度。在白人少女中，室内日光浴禁令减少了自我报告的室内日光浴行为，并增加了防晒行为。我们还发现，青少年室内日光浴禁令通过增加日光浴沙龙关闭和减少其销售额，显著缩小了室内日光浴市场的规模。

29442.title: A Temporary VAT Cut as Unconventional Fiscal Policy
29442.zh_title: 临时性增值税削减作为非常规财政政策
29442.authors: Ruediger Bachmann, Benjamin Born, Olga Goldfayn-Frank, Georgi Kocharkov, Ralph Luetticke, Michael Weber
29442.abstract: We exploit Germany’s temporary three-percentage-point VAT cut in the second half of 2020 to study the spending response to unconventional fiscal policy. We use survey and scanner data on household consumption expenditures and their perceived pass-through of the tax change into prices and a HANK model to quantify the effects of this VAT policy. The survey and scanner data show that the temporary VAT reduction led to a relative increase in durable and, to a lesser extent, semi-durable spending for individuals with high perceived pass-through. According to the HANK model, the VAT policy increased total aggregate consumption spending by 4.3 percent on impact.
29442.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国在2020年下半年实施的临时性三个百分点增值税削减，研究消费对非常规财政政策的反应。我们使用关于家庭消费支出及其对税收变化传导至价格的感知的调查和扫描数据，以及一个异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型，来量化这项增值税政策的效果。调查和扫描数据显示，对于感知传导率高的个体，临时性增值税削减导致耐用品支出相对增加，半耐用品支出增加程度较小。根据异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型，这项增值税政策在实施时使总消费支出增加了4.3%。
29442.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：D12, E20, E21, E62, E65, H31

29441.title: Macroprudential Policies and The Covid-19 Pandemic: Risks and Challenges For Emerging Markets
29441.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策与新冠疫情：新兴市场的风险与挑战
29441.abstract: This paper deals with COVID and macroprudential regulations in emerging markets. I document the build-up of a sturdy macroprudential structure during 2009-2019, and the relaxation of regulations in 2020-2021, as part of the effort to deal with the sanitary emergency. I show that in every country, regulatory forbearance played a key role in the response to COVID. I discuss capital controls as macroprudential instruments. I argue that rebuilding the macroprudential fabric is important to reduce the costs of future systemic shocks. I maintain that post-COVID regulations should incorporate the risks associated with digital currencies.
29441.zh_abstract: 本文探讨新冠疫情与新兴市场的宏观审慎监管。我记录了2009-2019年间稳健宏观审慎框架的建立，以及2020-2021年间作为应对卫生紧急事件努力的一部分而放松监管的情况。我表明，在每个国家，监管宽容在应对新冠疫情中发挥了关键作用。我讨论了资本管制作为宏观审慎工具的作用。我认为，重建宏观审慎框架对于降低未来系统性冲击的成本至关重要。我坚持认为，疫情后的监管应纳入与数字货币相关的风险。

29440.title: Estimating the Economic Value of Zoning Reform
29440.zh_title: 估算区划改革的经济价值
29440.authors: Santosh Anagol, Fernando V. Ferreira, Jonah M. Rexer
29440.abstract: We develop a framework to estimate the economic value of a recent zoning reform in the city of São Paulo, which altered maximum permitted construction at the city-block level. Using a spatial regression discontinuity design, we show that developers respond to the reform with short-run increases in filings for multi-family construction permits in blocks with higher allowable densities. In the medium-run we observe increases in housing availability and reductions in house prices in neighborhoods that were allowed more densification. Welfare is then estimated with an equilibrium model of housing demand and supply that allows for endogeneous housing regulation. We finding that, in the long-run, the reform produces a 1.9% increase in housing stock and a 0.5% reduction in prices, with substantial heterogeneity across neighborhoods. Consumer welfare gains due to price reductions are small, but increase 4-fold once accounting for changes in built environment, with more gains accruing to college educated and higher income families. However, nominal house price losses faced by landlords and existing homeowners overshadow all consumer welfare gains.
29440.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个框架来估算圣保罗市近期一项区划改革的经济价值，该改革在街区层面改变了最大允许建设量。利用空间断点回归设计，我们表明，开发商对改革的反应是，在允许密度更高的街区，短期内多户住宅建设许可申请增加。在中期，我们观察到，在允许更多密度化的社区，住房供应增加，房价下降。然后，我们通过一个允许内生性住房监管的住房需求和供给均衡模型来估算福利。我们发现，长期来看，改革使住房存量增加1.9%，价格下降0.5%，且各社区之间存在显著异质性。消费者因价格下降获得的福利收益很小，但在考虑建成环境变化后增加了四倍，更多收益流向受过大学教育和收入较高的家庭。然而，房东和现有房主面临的名义房价损失超过了所有消费者福利收益。
29440.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, IO, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：H0, O18, R0

29439.title: Medication of Postpartum Depression and Maternal Outcomes: Evidence from Geographic Variation in Dutch Prescribing
29439.zh_title: 产后抑郁症药物治疗与产妇结局：来自荷兰处方地理差异的证据
29439.abstract: Using data on over 420,000 first time Dutch mothers, we examine the effects of postpartum antidepressant use on a wide range of maternal outcomes including further treatment for severe mental illness, labor market outcomes, and family formation. We exploit rules which state that Dutch general practitioners (GPs) must be available to make house calls to their patients. In practice many therefore use postal code boundaries to limit their practices. We instrument a postpartum woman’s receipt of antidepressants with the propensity to prescribe antidepressants to women aged 46 to 65 among GPs in her postal code. Ordinary Least Squares estimates suggest highly negative effects of postpartum treatment with antidepressants, but this is mainly due to selection into treatment. Instrumental variable estimates suggest that the marginal patient treated with postpartum antidepressants is much more likely to continue taking antidepressants long-term, with little evidence of effects on other outcomes.
29439.zh_abstract: 利用超过42万名荷兰初产妇的数据，我们研究了产后抗抑郁药使用对一系列产妇结局的影响，包括严重精神疾病的进一步治疗、劳动力市场结果和家庭形成。我们利用一项规定，即荷兰全科医生必须能够为其患者提供上门服务。实际上，许多人因此使用邮政编码边界来限制其执业范围。我们以产后妇女所在邮政编码区全科医生对46至65岁女性开具抗抑郁药的倾向作为工具变量，来估计其接受抗抑郁药治疗的情况。普通最小二乘估计表明，产后抗抑郁药治疗具有高度负向效应，但这主要是由于选择进入治疗所致。工具变量估计表明，接受产后抗抑郁药治疗的边际患者长期继续服用抗抑郁药的可能性要大得多，而对其他结局的影响证据很少。

29438.title: The Economics of Medical Procedure Innovation
29438.zh_title: 医疗程序创新的经济学
29438.authors: David Dranove, Craig Garthwaite, Christopher Heard, Bingxiao Wu
29438.abstract: This paper explores the economic incentives for medical procedure innovation. Using a proprietary dataset on billing code applications for emerging medical procedures, we highlight two mechanisms that could hinder innovation. First, the administrative hurdle of securing permanent, reimbursable billing codes substantially delays innovation diffusion. We find that Medicare utilization of innovative procedures increases nearly nine-fold after the billing codes are promoted to permanent (reimbursable) from provisional (non-reimbursable). However, only 29 percent of the provisional codes are promoted within the five-year probation period. Second, medical procedures lack intellectual property rights, especially those without patented devices. When appropriability is limited, specialty medical societies lead the applications for billing codes. We indicate that the ad hoc process for securing billing codes for procedure innovations creates uncertainty about both the development process and the allocation and enforceability of property rights. This stands in stark contrast to the more deliberate regulatory oversight for pharmaceutical innovations.
29438.zh_abstract: 本文探讨医疗程序创新的经济激励。利用一个关于新兴医疗程序计费代码申请的专有数据集，我们强调了可能阻碍创新的两种机制。首先，获得永久性、可报销计费代码的行政障碍显著延迟了创新扩散。我们发现，在计费代码从临时（不可报销）升级为永久（可报销）后，医疗保险对创新程序的使用增加了近九倍。然而，在五年试用期内，只有29%的临时代码获得了升级。其次，医疗程序缺乏知识产权保护，尤其是那些没有专利设备的程序。当可占有性有限时，专业医学协会主导了计费代码的申请。我们指出，为程序创新获取计费代码的临时性过程，在开发过程以及产权的分配和可执行性方面都造成了不确定性。这与药品创新中更为审慎的监管监督形成鲜明对比。
29438.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：I0, I1, O3

29437.title: The International Price of Remote Work
29437.authors: Agostina Brinatti, Alberto Cavallo, Javier Cravino, Andres Drenik
29437.abstract: We use data from a large web-based job platform to study how the price of remote work is determined in a globalized labor market. In the platform, workers located around the world compete for jobs that can be done remotely. We document that, despite the global nature of the marketplace, the worker’s country accounts for almost a third of the variance in remote wages. The observed wage differences are strongly correlated to the GDP per capita in the worker’s location. This correlation is not accounted for by differences in workers’ observable characteristics, occupations, or differences in the employers’ locations. Instead, data on wage-histories indicate that remote wages are partly determined by the conditions that workers face in their local labor markets. We also document that, as with internationally traded goods, remote wages expressed in local currency move strongly with the dollar exchange rate of the worker’s country, and are highly sensitive to changes in the wages of foreign competitors.
29437.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个大型网络工作平台的数据，研究在全球化劳动力市场中远程工作的价格是如何决定的。在该平台上，世界各地的工人竞争可以远程完成的工作。我们记录到，尽管市场具有全球性，但工人所在国家几乎占远程工资差异的三分之一。观察到的工资差异与工人所在地的人均国内生产总值密切相关。这种相关性不能用工人可观测特征、职业或雇主所在地的差异来解释。相反，工资历史数据表明，远程工资部分由工人在当地劳动力市场面临的条件决定。我们还记录到，如同国际贸易商品一样，以当地货币表示的远程工资与工人所在国的美元汇率强烈联动，并且对外国竞争对手工资的变化高度敏感。
29437.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, LS；JEL：F1, F2, F4, F6

29436.title: Women in Science. Lessons from the Baby Boom
29436.zh_title: 科学界的女性：婴儿潮时期的教训
29436.abstract: How do children affect women in science? We investigate this question using rich biographical data, linked with patents and publications, for 83,000 American scientists in 1956 at the height of the baby boom. Our analyses reveal a unique life-cycle pattern of productivity for mothers. While other scientists peak in their mid-thirties, mothers become more productive after age 35 and maintain high productivity in their 40s and 50s. Event studies show that the output of mothers increases after 15 years of marriage, while other scientists peak in the first 10 years. Differences in the timing of productivity have important implications for tenure and participation. Just 27% of mothers who are academic scientists get tenure, compared with 48% of fathers and 46% of women without children. Mothers face comparable tenure rates to other assistant professors for the first six years but fall behind afterwards, suggesting that they face higher standards of early productivity. Mothers who survive in science are extremely positively selected: Compared with other married women, mothers patent (publish) 2.5 (1.4) times more before the median age at marriage. Compared with men, female scientists are more educated, half as likely to marry, one-third as likely to have children, but half as likely to survive in science. Employment records indicate that a generation of baby boom mothers was lost to science.
29436.zh_abstract: 子女如何影响科学界的女性？我们利用1956年婴儿潮高峰期83,000名美国科学家的丰富传记数据，并结合专利和出版物信息来探究这一问题。我们的分析揭示了母亲群体独特的生命周期生产力模式。其他科学家在35岁左右达到顶峰，而母亲在35岁后生产力更高，并在40岁和50岁保持高生产力。事件研究显示，母亲在结婚15年后产出增加，而其他科学家在结婚头10年达到顶峰。生产力时间节点的差异对终身教职和职业留存有重要影响。在学术科学家中，只有27%的母亲获得终身教职，而父亲为48%，无子女女性为46%。母亲在头六年的终身教职获得率与其他助理教授相当，但之后落后，这表明她们面临更高的早期生产力标准。在科学界幸存下来的母亲是经过极端正向选择的：与其他已婚女性相比，母亲在结婚中位年龄之前的专利（出版物）数量是其2.5（1.4）倍。与男性相比，女性科学家受教育程度更高，结婚可能性低一半，生育可能性低三分之一，但在科学界留存的可能性也低一半。就业记录表明，整整一代婴儿潮母亲在科学界流失了。
29436.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, PR；JEL：J13, J16, J24, N3, N32, O3

29435.title: The Global Distribution of Authorship in Economics Journals
29435.zh_title: 经济学期刊作者身份的全球分布
29435.authors: Ernest Aigner, Jacob Greenspon, Dani Rodrik
29435.abstract: We assemble a dataset of the universe of economics and business journal articles published since 1980 to assess differences in the levels and trends of the global distribution of authorship in economics journals and citations by country/region, quality of journal, and fields of specialization. We document striking imbalances. While Western and Northern European authors have made substantial gains, the representation of authors based in low-income countries remains extremely low -- an order of magnitude lower than the weight of their countries or regions in the global economy. Fields such as international or development economics where global diversification may have been expected have not experienced much increase in developing country authorship. Developing country representation has risen fastest at journals ranked 100th or lower, while it has barely increased in journals ranked 25th or higher. Regression analyses suggest that articles by developing country authors are far less likely to be published in top journals even when holding constant article quality (as proxied by citation counts). Similar trends are observed in citation patterns, with articles by authors in the U.S. receiving far more citations, and those by authors in developing countries receiving fewer. These results are consistent with a general increase in the relative supply of research in the rest of the world. But they also indicate authors from developing countries remain excluded from the profession’s top-rated journals and that their research receives less attention from other economists.
29435.zh_abstract: 我们汇编了自1980年以来发表的所有经济学和商业期刊文章的数据集，以评估经济学期刊作者身份全球分布的水平与趋势差异，按国家/地区、期刊质量和专业领域划分。我们记录了显著的失衡。虽然西欧和北欧作者取得了实质性进展，但来自低收入国家的作者比例仍然极低——比其国家或地区在全球经济中的权重低一个数量级。在国际经济学或发展经济学等可能预期实现全球多元化的领域，发展中国家的作者比例并未显著增加。发展中国家作者的代表性在排名第100位或更低的期刊中增长最快，而在排名第25位或更高的期刊中几乎没有增加。回归分析表明，即使控制文章质量（以引用次数衡量），发展中国家作者的文章在顶级期刊上发表的可能性也远低于其他国家。在引用模式中也观察到类似趋势，美国作者的文章获得更多引用，而发展中国家作者的文章获得较少引用。这些结果与世界其他地区研究相对供给普遍增加相一致。但它们也表明，发展中国家作者仍然被排除在该行业顶级期刊之外，且其研究受到其他经济学家的关注较少。

29434.title: The Debt Capacity of a Government
29434.authors: Bernard Dumas, Paul Ehling, Chunyu Yang
29434.abstract: In a deterministic overlapping-generations economy with production and physical capital, the market value of debt is not necessarily equal to the present discounted value of future budget surpluses: it can be positive without any budget surpluses being in the oﬃng, because debt incorporates a rational bubble. Yet the dynamics of debt remain a function of the dynamics of the primary budget deﬁcit. The true ﬁscal cost of excessive government debt issuance cannot be assessed just from the current rate of interest or any current macroeconomic variable. Rather, it should be assessed in a dynamic context reﬂecting anticipated deﬁcits and population growth going forward. As a way to study their joint behavior, we specify the variation of a structural deﬁcit in the form of an underfunded social-security scheme. We deﬁne debt capacity as the level of debt that can be just sustained without a change of policy all the way to an unstable steady state. When it starts below the capacity, the debt converges to a stable steady state, in which the bubble is sustained. Above capacity the bubble unravels and the deﬁcit cannot be ﬁnanced. In several realistic scenarios occurring in economies, we calculate the needed policy response, which is the true “ﬁscal cost” of exceeding debt capacity.
29434.zh_abstract: 在一个具有生产和物质资本的确定性世代交叠经济中，债务的市场价值不一定等于未来预算盈余的现值：即使没有预算盈余，债务的市场价值也可能为正，因为债务包含一个理性泡沫。然而，债务的动态仍然是初级预算赤字动态的函数。过度政府债务发行的真实财政成本不能仅根据当前利率或任何当前宏观经济变量来评估。相反，应在反映预期赤字和未来人口增长的动态背景下进行评估。为研究其联合行为，我们以资金不足的社会保障计划形式指定结构性赤字的变化。我们将债务承载能力定义为在不改变政策的情况下，能够刚好维持到非稳定稳态的债务水平。当债务起始低于承载能力时，债务收敛于一个稳定稳态，其中泡沫得以维持。高于承载能力时，泡沫破裂，赤字无法融资。在经济体中发生的几个现实情景中，我们计算了所需的政策响应，即超出债务承载能力的真实“财政成本”。
29434.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：E13, E43, E44, E50, E62, E63, H30, H62, H63, H68

29433.title: The Geography of Retirement
29433.abstract: As Americans work longer in response to a changing retirement landscape, it is important to ask whether there are groups being left out of this trend. Geography is a natural lens through which to examine this question, given regional disparities in the employment of prime-age individuals. In this study, we explore the geography of retirement using data from the U.S. Census/American Community Survey and other sources. We find large differences across U.S. commuting zones in employment rates at older ages, with a gap of about 20 percentage points between areas at the 90th and 10th percentiles of employment. Low-employment areas are systematically different, with a less educated and more diverse population, more low-wage jobs and import competition from China, poorer health outcomes and health care access, lower government spending, and more income inequality. Although these correlations are not necessarily causal, these factors collectively can explain about four-fifths of the geographic variation in employment at older ages.
29433.zh_abstract: 随着美国人因退休格局变化而延长工作年限，探究是否有群体被排除在这一趋势之外至关重要。鉴于壮年个体就业的地区差异，地理是审视这一问题的自然视角。在本研究中，我们利用美国人口普查/美国社区调查及其他来源的数据，探讨退休的地理分布。我们发现，美国各通勤区在老年就业率上存在巨大差异，就业率第90百分位与第10百分位地区之间的差距约为20个百分点。低就业地区存在系统性差异：人口受教育程度较低且更多元化，低工资工作岗位更多，面临更多来自中国的进口竞争，健康状况和医疗保健可及性更差，政府支出更低，收入不平等程度更高。尽管这些相关性不一定是因果关系，但这些因素总体上可以解释约五分之四的老年就业地理差异。

29432.title: Nonlinearities and a Pecking Order in Cross-border Investment
29432.zh_title: 跨境投资中的非线性与啄序
29432.authors: Sara B. Holland, Sergei Sarkissian, Michael Schill, Francis E. Warnock
29432.abstract: Nonlinearities can arise in international investment factors because of a pecking order in barriers. When direct barriers are severe, improvements in governance factors such as rule of law and expropriation risk can increase investment. Only when severe barriers are ameliorated can factors such as firm-specific information, transaction costs and hedging motives become more important. Evidence from unconditional quantile regressions provides support for a pecking order hypothesis, as we find that investment factors vary across the distribution. Specifically, our empirical results indicate that access to basic information is important everywhere, governance and familiarity matter where barriers are high, roles for information and hedging motives become more apparent where barriers are moderate, and where there are no barriers small improvements in governance have little effect on investment. Going forward, analysis should incorporate nonlinearities inherent in cross-border barriers and investment.
29432.zh_abstract: 由于障碍存在啄序，国际投资因素中可能出现非线性。当直接障碍严重时，改善法治和征用风险等治理因素可以增加投资。只有当严重障碍得到缓解时，企业特定信息、交易成本和套期保值动机等因素才会变得更加重要。来自无条件分位数回归的证据为啄序假说提供了支持，因为我们发现投资因素随分布而变化。具体而言，我们的实证结果表明，获取基本信息在任何地方都很重要；在障碍高的地方，治理和熟悉度至关重要；在障碍适中的地方，信息和套期保值动机的作用变得更加明显；而在没有障碍的地方，治理的微小改善对投资影响甚微。未来，分析应纳入跨境障碍和投资中固有的非线性。

29428.title: Exchange Rates as Trade Frictions: Estimates and Implications for Policy
29428.zh_title: 作为贸易摩擦的汇率：估计与政策含义
29428.abstract: This paper improves on current treatment of exchange rate variation in quantitative trade models. Exchange rate changes with heterogeneous passthrough to buyers are embedded in the structural gravity model. Quantification on two digit annual bilateral trade data reveals real effects of exchange rate changes on producers that are substantial for some country-sector-time period observations. Real national income effects are small but not always negligible. Effective exchange Rates with Gravitas (ERGs) are introduced as theory-consistent indexes to guide potential policy remedies.
29428.zh_abstract: 本文改进了当前定量贸易模型中对汇率变动的处理方法。具有异质性传递效应的汇率变化被嵌入结构性引力模型中。基于两位数年度双边贸易数据的量化分析显示，汇率变化对生产者产生的实际效应对于某些国家-行业-时间段的观测值是显著的。实际国民收入效应虽小但并非总是可忽略。我们引入了具有引力效应的有效汇率（ERGs），作为理论一致的指标来指导潜在的政策补救措施。

29427.title: Loan Officers Impede Graduation from Microfinance: Strategic Disclosure in a Large Microfinance Institution
29427.zh_title: 信贷员阻碍小额信贷客户升级：一家大型小额信贷机构中的策略性披露
29427.abstract: One of the most important puzzles in microfinance is the low rate of borrower graduation to larger, more flexible loans. Utilizing observational and experimental data from a large Chilean microfinance institution, we demonstrate that loan officers impede borrower graduation due to common features of their compensation contracts. Our partner lender offers both microloans and larger, more flexible graduation loans, and relies on loan officer endorsements to determine borrower graduation. Loan officers are rewarded for the size of their portfolio and repayment, and so are implicitly penalized when good borrowers graduate. In an experiment designed to isolate strategic disclosure, we modify compensation to reduce this implicit penalty and document that loan officers withheld endorsements of their most qualified borrowers prior to the shift. Graduated borrowers endorsed after the shift are 34% more profitable for our partner lender than those endorsed beforehand. A back-of-the- envelope calculation suggests that strategic behavior of loan officers accounts for $\$4.8$-29.2 billion in lost social value from forgone borrower graduations in microfinance worldwide. Our experimental design may prove useful for other experiments within firms.
29427.zh_abstract: 小额信贷中最重要的问题之一是借款人升级到更大、更灵活贷款的比率较低。利用智利一家大型小额信贷机构的观察和实验数据，我们证明信贷员因其薪酬合同的常见特征而阻碍借款人升级。我们的合作贷款机构同时提供小额贷款和更大、更灵活的升级贷款，并依赖信贷员的推荐来决定借款人是否升级。信贷员因其投资组合规模和还款率而获得奖励，因此当优质借款人升级时，他们会受到隐性惩罚。在一项旨在隔离策略性披露的实验中，我们修改了薪酬以减少这种隐性惩罚，并记录了信贷员在薪酬调整前隐瞒了对其最合格借款人的推荐。薪酬调整后升级的借款人为合作贷款机构带来的利润比调整前升级的借款人高出34%。粗略计算表明，信贷员的策略性行为导致全球小额信贷中因借款人未能升级而损失的社会价值达48亿至292亿美元。我们的实验设计可能对企业的其他实验有用。

29426.title: The Evolving Impacts of the COVID-19 Pandemic on Gender Inequality in the U.S. Labor Market: The COVID Motherhood Penalty
29426.zh_title: COVID-19疫情对美国劳动力市场性别不平等影响的演变：COVID母亲惩罚
29426.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Kenneth Couch, Huanan Xu
29426.abstract: We explore whether COVID-19 disproportionately affected women in the labor market using CPS data through the end of 2020. We find that male-female gaps in the employment-to-population ratio and hours worked for women with school-age children have widened but not for those with younger children. Triple-difference estimates are consistent with most of the reductions observed for women with school-age children being attributable to additional child care responsibilities (the “COVID motherhood penalty”). Conducting decompositions, we find women had a greater likelihood to telework, higher education levels and a less-impacted occupational distribution, which all contributed to lessening negative impacts relative to men.
29426.zh_abstract: 我们利用截至2020年底的当前人口调查（CPS）数据，探讨COVID-19是否对女性在劳动力市场产生了不成比例的影响。我们发现，对于有学龄子女的女性，其就业人口比和工时方面的男女差距已经扩大，但对于有更年幼子女的女性则不然。三重差分估计表明，在有学龄子女的女性中观察到的减少大部分可归因于额外的育儿责任（即“COVID母亲惩罚”）。通过分解分析，我们发现女性更有可能远程办公、受教育程度更高且职业分布受冲击较小，这些因素都有助于减轻相对于男性的负面影响。

29425.title: Spillover Effects from Voluntary Employer Minimum Wages
29425.zh_title: 自愿性雇主最低工资的溢出效应
29425.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, Clemens Noelke, David Weil, Bledi Taska
29425.abstract: Low unionization rates, a falling real federal minimum wage, and outsourcing have hampered wage growth in the low-wage sector in the US. In recent years, a number of private employers have opted to institute or raise company-wide minimum wages for their employees, sometimes in response to public pressure. To what extent do wage-setting changes at major employers spill over to other employers, and what are the broader labor market effects of these policies? In this paper, we study recent minimum wages by Amazon, Walmart, Target, CVS, and Costco using data from millions of online job ads; employee surveys; and the CPS. \nAlthough the following version of this paper presents evidence that these policies induced wage increases at low-wage jobs at other employers, where the modal response was to match the wage announced by the large retailer, we have discovered a fundamental issue with the methodology used to measure basic spillover impacts. This methodology as well as associated robustness checks used in the paper, which emulated approaches in the larger literature on minimum wage effects, leads to estimated effects that arise from statistical mean reversion. When we apply a series of placebo and related tests and simulations using revised spillover treatment effect estimators, detailed in Appendix A, we do not find evidence of the spillover effects described in the following paper. A revised paper with a full discussion of the problems of the original approach and new results regarding revised estimates of spillover effects is forthcoming.
29425.zh_abstract: 低工会化率、联邦实际最低工资下降以及外包抑制了美国低工资部门的工资增长。近年来，一些私营雇主选择为其员工设立或提高全公司范围的最低工资，有时是出于公众压力。主要雇主的工资设定变化在多大程度上会溢出到其他雇主，这些政策对更广泛的劳动力市场有何影响？本文利用来自数百万在线招聘广告、员工调查和当前人口调查的数据，研究了亚马逊、沃尔玛、塔吉特、CVS和好市多近期的最低工资政策。尽管本文的以下版本提供了证据表明这些政策导致其他雇主低工资岗位的工资上涨，其中最常见的反应是与大型零售商宣布的工资相匹配，但我们发现用于衡量基本溢出影响的方法存在根本性问题。本文使用的这种方法以及相关的稳健性检验，模仿了关于最低工资影响的更广泛文献中的方法，导致估计效应源于统计均值回归。当我们使用附录A中详述的修订后的溢出处理效应估计量进行一系列安慰剂和相关检验及模拟时，我们没有发现以下论文中描述的溢出效应的证据。一篇修订后的论文将全面讨论原始方法的问题以及关于溢出效应修订估计的新结果，即将发布。

29424.title: Population Growth and Firm Dynamics
29424.abstract: Population growth has declined markedly in almost all major economies since the 1970s. We argue this trend has important consequences for the process of firm dynamics and aggregate growth. We study a rich semi-endogenous growth model of firm dynamics, and show analytically that a decline in population growth reduces creative destruction, increases average firm size and concentration, raises market power and misallocation, and lowers aggregate growth in the long-run. We also show lower population growth has positive effects on the level of productivity, making the short-run welfare impacts ambiguous. In a quantitative application to the U.S, we find that the slowdown in population growth since the 1980s and the projected continuation of this trend accounts for a substantial share of the fall in the entry and exit rates and the increase in firm size. By contrast, the impact on markups is modest. The effect on aggregate growth is positive for around two decades, before turning negative thereafter.
29424.zh_abstract: 自1970年代以来，几乎所有主要经济体的人口增长都显著下降。我们认为这一趋势对企业动态过程和总体增长具有重要影响。我们研究了一个丰富的企业动态半内生增长模型，并分析表明，人口增长下降会长期减少创造性破坏、增加平均企业规模和集中度、提高市场力量和资源错配，并降低总体增长。我们还表明，较低的人口增长对生产率水平有积极影响，使得短期福利影响变得模糊。在对美国的定量应用中，我们发现自1980年代以来人口增长的放缓以及这一趋势的预期延续，在很大程度上解释了进入率和退出率的下降以及企业规模的增加。相比之下，对加成率的影响较小。对总体增长的影响在约二十年内为正，之后转为负。
29424.meta: Programs：EFG, PR；JEL：J11, L11, O3, O4, O44

29423.title: The Effects of Education on Mortality: Evidence Using College Expansions
29423.zh_title: 教育对死亡率的影响：利用大学扩张的证据
29423.abstract: This paper explores the long-run health benefits of education for longevity. Using mortality data from the Social Security Administration (1988-2005) linked to geographic locations in the 1940-census data, we exploit changes in college availability across cohorts in local areas. We estimate an intent to treat effect of exposure to an additional 4-year college around age 17 of increasing longevity by 0.13 months; treatment on the treated calculations suggest increases in longevity between 1-1.6 years. Some further analyses suggest the results are not driven by pre-tends, endogenous migration, and other time-varying local confounders. This paper adds to the literature on the health and social benefits of education.
29423.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了教育对长寿的长期健康益处。利用社会保障管理局（1988-2005年）的死亡率数据，并与1940年人口普查数据中的地理位置相关联，我们利用了地方层面不同出生队列间大学入学机会的变化。我们估计了在17岁左右接触额外一所四年制大学的意向治疗效应，使寿命增加0.13个月；接受治疗者的计算表明寿命增加在1至1.6年之间。进一步的分析表明，这些结果并非由预先趋势、内生迁移和其他随时间变化的地方混杂因素驱动。本文补充了关于教育健康和社会益处的文献。

29422.title: Mental Health, Creativity, and Wealth
29422.zh_title: 心理健康、创造力与财富
29422.authors: Barbara Biasi, Michael S. Dahl, Petra Moser
29422.abstract: Focusing on bipolar disorder (BD), we investigate the link between mental health, creativity, and wealth. Analyzing population data for Denmark, we find that people with BD are more likely to be musicians, but less likely to hold other creative jobs than the population. Healthy siblings of people with BD, however, are consistently more likely to work in creative jobs. We also show people in the top decile of parental wealth are seven times as likely to work in creative professions compared with the bottom decile. Yet, wealth differences only explain a small portion of the link between BD and creativity.
29422.zh_abstract: 聚焦于双相情感障碍，我们研究了心理健康、创造力与财富之间的联系。通过分析丹麦的人口数据，我们发现患有双相情感障碍的人更有可能成为音乐家，但从事其他创造性工作的可能性低于普通人群。然而，双相情感障碍患者的健康兄弟姐妹始终更有可能从事创造性工作。我们还表明，父母财富处于最高十分位的人从事创造性职业的可能性是处于最低十分位的人的七倍。然而，财富差异只能解释双相情感障碍与创造力之间联系的一小部分。

29421.title: FinTech Lending
29421.authors: Tobias Berg, Andreas Fuster, Manju Puri
29421.abstract: In this paper, we review the growing literature on FinTech lending – the provision of credit facilitated by technology that improves the customer-lender interaction or lenders’ screening and monitoring of borrowers. FinTech lending has grown rapidly, though in developed economies like the U.S. it still only accounts for a small share of total credit. An increase in convenience and speed appears to have been more central to FinTech lending’s growth than improved screening or monitoring, though there is certainly potential for the latter, as is the case for increased financial inclusion. The COVID-19 pandemic has shown potential vulnerabilities of FinTech lenders, although in certain segments they have displayed rapid growth.
29421.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们回顾了关于金融科技贷款日益增长的文献——即由技术促进的信贷提供，这种技术改善了客户与贷款人的互动或贷款人对借款人的筛选和监控。金融科技贷款增长迅速，尽管在美国等发达经济体中，它仍只占总信贷的一小部分。便利性和速度的提高似乎比改进的筛选或监控对金融科技贷款的增长更为核心，尽管后者当然有潜力，正如增加金融包容性的情况一样。COVID-19大流行显示了金融科技贷款机构的潜在脆弱性，尽管在某些细分市场中它们表现出快速增长。

29420.title: Does Research Save Lives? The Local Spillovers of Biomedical Research on Mortality
29420.zh_title: 研究能拯救生命吗？生物医学研究对死亡率的本地溢出效应
29420.abstract: This paper investigates the local impact of biomedical research on mortality in the USA. Causally estimating the marginal value of biomedical research is challenging due to a lack of micro data linking health outcomes to plausibly exogenous variation in research. We create a new linkage between a research database (PubMed) and administrative death records that enables research to be related to mortality at the geographic, disease and time level. We then estimate the marginal impact of biomedical research on mortality using hospital market (HRR) level shocks to research activity by disease. Our identification strategy builds on the literature on the dissemination of knowledge, specifically that of local knowledge spillovers. By utilizing variation across diseases, time and distance from research we control for additional trends relative to the current literature. Our results show that an additional research publication on average reduces local mortality from a disease by 0.35%. Our results also provide novel evidence that there are health benefits to the local communities (local spillovers) in which biomedical research is conducted.
29420.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国生物医学研究对死亡率的本地影响。由于缺乏将健康结果与研究中的合理外生变化联系起来的微观数据，因果估计生物医学研究的边际价值具有挑战性。我们创建了一个研究数据库与行政死亡记录之间的新链接，使得研究能够在地理、疾病和时间层面与死亡率相关联。然后，我们利用医院市场层面按疾病划分的研究活动冲击，估计了生物医学研究对死亡率的边际影响。我们的识别策略建立在知识传播文献的基础上，特别是本地知识溢出效应。通过利用疾病、时间和距离研究的变异，我们相对于现有文献控制了额外的趋势。我们的结果表明，平均而言，额外一篇研究出版物使某种疾病的本地死亡率降低0.35%。我们的结果还提供了新的证据，表明进行生物医学研究的本地社区存在健康益处。

29419.title: A Social Insurance Perspective on Pandemic Fiscal Policy: Implications for Unemployment Insurance and Hazard Pay
29419.zh_title: 大流行时期财政政策的社会保险视角：对失业保险和危险津贴的启示
29419.authors: Christina D. Romer, David H. Romer
29419.abstract: This paper considers fiscal policy during the pandemic through the lens of optimal social insurance. We develop a simple framework to analyze how government taxes and transfers could mimic the insurance against pandemic income losses that people would like to have had. Permutations of the framework provide insight into how unemployment insurance should be structured, when and how much hazard pay is called for, and whether fiscal policy should aim just to redistribute income or also to stimulate aggregate demand during a pandemic. When we use the insights from the model to evaluate unemployment insurance measures taken during the pandemic, we find that some, but far from all, of the implications of the social insurance framework were followed. In the case of hazard pay, we find that the proposal for a national program (the never-implemented HEROES Act) was both broader and more generous than a social insurance perspective would call for. We suggest that the social insurance perspective on fiscal policy is likely to become increasingly relevant as pandemics and climate-related natural disasters become more common causes of unemployment and recessions.
29419.zh_abstract: 本文通过最优社会保险的视角审视大流行期间的财政政策。我们开发了一个简单的框架来分析政府的税收和转移支付如何能够模仿人们希望拥有的针对大流行收入损失的保险。该框架的多种变体提供了关于失业保险应如何构建、何时以及需要多少危险津贴、以及财政政策是否应仅旨在重新分配收入还是也应在疫情期间刺激总需求的见解。当我们利用模型中的见解评估疫情期间采取的失业保险措施时，我们发现社会保险框架的一些（但远非全部）含义得到了遵循。在危险津贴方面，我们发现国家计划的提案（从未实施的《英雄法案》）比社会保险视角所要求的更广泛和更慷慨。我们建议，随着大流行和气候相关自然灾害成为失业和衰退的更常见原因，财政政策的社会保险视角可能变得越来越相关。
29419.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：E62, E65, H21, H31, I18

29418.title: Immigration and Occupational Comparative Advantage
29418.abstract: Job choice by high-skilled foreign-born workers in the US correlates strongly with country of origin. We apply a Fréchet-Roy model of occupational choice to evaluate the causes of immigrant sorting. In a gravity specification, we find that revealed comparative advantage in the US is stronger for workers from countries with higher education quality in occupations that are more intensive in cognitive reasoning, and for workers from countries that are more linguistically similar to the US in occupations that are more intensive in communication. Our findings hold for immigrants who arrived in the US at age 18 or older (who received their K-12 education abroad) but not for immigrants who arrived in the US as children (who received their K-12 education domestically). We obtain similar results for immigrant sorting in Canada, which supports our interpretation that origin-country education quality, rather than US immigration policy, is what drives sorting patterns. In counterfactual analysis, we evaluate the consequences of reallocating visas for college-educated immigrants according to origin-country education quality.
29418.zh_abstract: 美国高技能外国出生工人的工作选择与来源国密切相关。我们应用一个Fréchet-Roy职业选择模型来评估移民分类的原因。在一个引力模型中，我们发现，对于来自高等教育质量较高国家的工人，在更依赖认知推理的职业中，美国的显示性比较优势更强；对于来自语言与美国更相似国家的工人，在更依赖沟通的职业中，这种优势也更强。我们的发现适用于18岁或以上抵达美国（在国外接受K-12教育）的移民，但不适用于作为儿童抵达美国（在国内接受K-12教育）的移民。我们在加拿大移民分类中获得了类似的结果，这支持了我们的解释，即来源国教育质量（而非美国移民政策）是驱动分类模式的原因。在反事实分析中，我们评估了根据来源国教育质量重新分配大学学历移民签证的后果。
29418.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：F22, I25, J61, O15

29417.title: One Instrument to Rule Them All: The Bias and Coverage of Just-ID IV
29417.zh_title: 一统天下的工具变量：恰好识别IV的偏误与覆盖
29417.abstract: We revisit the finite-sample behavior of just-identified instrumental variables (IV) estimators, arguing that in most microeconometric applications, just-identified IV bias is negligible and the usual inference strategies likely reliable. Three widely-cited applications are used to explain why this is so. We then consider pretesting strategies of the form t1 > c, where t1 is the first-stage t-statistic, and the first-stage sign is given. Although pervasive in empirical practice, pretesting on the first-stage F-statistic exacerbates bias and distorts inference. We show, however, that median bias is both minimized and roughly halved by setting c = 0, that is by screening on the sign of the estimated first stage. This bias reduction is a free lunch: conventional confidence interval coverage is unchanged by screening on the estimated first-stage sign. To the extent that IV analysts sign-screen already, these results strengthen the case for a sanguine view of the finite-sample behavior of just-ID IV.
29417.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了恰好识别工具变量（IV）估计量的有限样本行为，认为在大多数微观计量经济学应用中，恰好识别IV的偏误可以忽略不计，且通常的推断策略是可靠的。我们使用三个被广泛引用的应用案例来解释为何如此。然后，我们考虑了形如t1 > c的预检验策略，其中t1是第一阶段的t统计量，且第一阶段的符号已给定。尽管在实证实践中普遍存在，但基于第一阶段F统计量的预检验会加剧偏误并扭曲推断。然而，我们表明，通过设定c = 0，即根据估计的第一阶段符号进行筛选，中位数偏误既被最小化又被大致减半。这种偏误减少是一种免费午餐：根据估计的第一阶段符号进行筛选不会改变传统置信区间的覆盖范围。鉴于IV分析者已经进行了符号筛选，这些结果强化了对恰好识别IV有限样本行为持乐观态度的理由。
29417.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C21, C26, C31, C36, J08

29416.title: O.M.W. Sprague (the Man Who “Wrote the Book” on Financial Crises) meets the Great Depression
29416.zh_title: O.M.W. 斯普拉格（撰写金融危机“权威著作”的人）与大萧条
29416.abstract: When the Great Depression struck the United States, Oliver M.W. Sprague was America’s foremost expert on financial crises. His History of Crises under the National Banking System is a frequently cited classic. Had he diagnosed a banking panic and called for an aggressive response by the Federal Reserve, it might have made a difference; but he did not. Sprague’s misdiagnosis had, I argue, two causes. First, the crisis lacked the symptoms of a panic, such as high short-term interest rates in the New York money market, which Sprague had identified from his studies of previous crises. Second, Sprague’s macro-economic ideas led him to conclude that an expansionary monetary policy would be of little help once a depression was underway. Sprague’s main concern was that abandoning the gold standard would intensify the crisis, a concern that led him to resign his position as advisor to the U.S. Treasury to protest Roosevelt’s gold policy.
29416.zh_abstract: 当大萧条袭击美国时，奥利弗·M·W·斯普拉格是美国研究金融危机的顶尖专家。他的《国家银行体系下的危机史》是一部被频繁引用的经典著作。如果他当时诊断出银行恐慌并呼吁美联储采取积极应对措施，情况可能会有所不同；但他没有。我认为，斯普拉格的误诊有两个原因。首先，这场危机缺乏恐慌的症状，例如纽约货币市场的高短期利率，而斯普拉格从他对以往危机的研究中已识别出这些症状。其次，斯普拉格的宏观经济观念使他得出结论，一旦萧条开始，扩张性货币政策将收效甚微。斯普拉格主要担心的是，放弃金本位会加剧危机，这种担忧导致他辞去美国财政部顾问的职务，以抗议罗斯福的黄金政策。

29415.title: Licence to Dine: 007 and the Real Exchange Rate
29415.zh_title: 用餐许可证：007与实际汇率
29415.authors: Lee A. Craig, Julianne Treme, Thomas J. Weiss
29415.abstract: We constructed a time series of menu prices for the identifiable restaurants at which James Bond dined in France and the UK that yields one of the few international price series representing luxury services. This series enabled us to calculate a real exchange rate based on prices pertinent to international travelers. We also compiled a time series on the salary of workers in the British Civil Service at Grade 7, like Bond, from 1953 to 2019. Our results indicate that French restaurant prices increased faster than Grade 7 salaries over the entire period and changes in the British exchange rate were not favorable for British travelers. To dine weekly in France, during the 1950s and 1960s, Bond would have spent 18 percent of his salary; whereas over the course of the Euro era the same basket of luxury services would have required on average 26 percent of his salary. Finally, our data indicate a likely violation of the law of one price during both the Pound-Franc and Pound-Euro eras.
29415.zh_abstract: 我们构建了詹姆斯·邦德在法国和英国用餐的可识别餐厅的菜单价格时间序列，这产生了少数代表奢侈服务的国际价格序列之一。该序列使我们能够基于与国际旅行者相关的价格计算实际汇率。我们还编制了1953年至2019年间英国公务员系统中与邦德同级别的7级职员工资的时间序列。我们的结果表明，在整个时期内，法国餐厅价格的上涨速度快于7级职员工资，且英国汇率的变化对英国旅行者不利。在1950年代和1960年代，邦德若每周在法国用餐，将花费其工资的18%；而在欧元时代，同样的奢侈服务组合平均需要其工资的26%。最后，我们的数据表明，在英镑-法郎和英镑-欧元两个时期，一价定律可能被违反。
29415.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM；JEL：D4, E3, F2, N10, N14, Z3

29414.title: Value without Employment
29414.abstract: Young firms' contribution to aggregate employment has been underwhelming. However, a similar trend is not apparent in their contribution to aggregate sales or aggregate stock market capitalization. We study the implications of the arrival of “low marginal - high average” revenue-product-of-labor firms in a stylized model of dynamic firm heterogeneity, and show that the model can account for a large number of facts related to the decline in “business dynamism”. We study the long-term implications of the decline in business dynamism on the economy by providing analytical results that connect the decline in dynamism to the eventual decline of consumption.
29414.zh_abstract: 年轻企业对总就业的贡献一直不尽如人意。然而，它们对总销售额或总股票市值的贡献并未出现类似趋势。我们在一个动态企业异质性的简化模型中研究了“低边际-高平均”劳动收入产品企业的出现所带来的影响，并表明该模型可以解释与“商业活力”下降相关的众多事实。我们通过提供将活力下降与消费最终下降联系起来的分析结果，研究了商业活力下降对经济的长期影响。
29414.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D24, E23, E24, E25, G24

29413.title: Understanding Algorithmic Discrimination in Health Economics Through the Lens of Measurement Errors
29413.zh_title: 通过测量误差的视角理解健康经济学中的算法歧视
29413.authors: Anirban Basu, Noah Hammarlund, Sara Khor, Aasthaa Bansal
29413.abstract: There is growing concern that the increasing use of machine learning and artificial intelligence-based systems may exacerbate health disparities through discrimination. We provide a hierarchical definition of discrimination consisting of algorithmic discrimination arising from predictive scores used for allocating resources and human discrimination arising from allocating resources by human decision-makers conditional on these predictive scores. We then offer an overarching statistical framework of algorithmic discrimination through the lens of measurement errors, which is familiar to the health economics audience. Specifically, we show that algorithmic discrimination exists when measurement errors exist in either the outcome or the predictors, and there is endogenous selection for participation in the observed data. The absence of any of these phenomena would eliminate algorithmic discrimination. We show that although equalized odds constraints can be employed as bias-mitigating strategies, such constraints may increase algorithmic discrimination when there is measurement error in the dependent variable.
29413.zh_abstract: 人们日益担忧，机器学习和基于人工智能系统的使用增加可能通过歧视加剧健康差距。我们提供了一个歧视的分层定义，包括源于用于分配资源的预测分数的算法歧视，以及人类决策者在给定这些预测分数条件下分配资源时产生的人类歧视。然后，我们通过测量误差的视角提供了一个算法歧视的总体统计框架，这对健康经济学受众来说是熟悉的。具体来说，我们表明，当结果或预测变量中存在测量误差，并且观察数据中存在参与的内生选择时，算法歧视就会存在。这些现象中任何一项的缺失都将消除算法歧视。我们表明，尽管可以使用均等赔率约束作为减轻偏误的策略，但当因变量存在测量误差时，此类约束可能会增加算法歧视。

29412.title: Herding with Heterogeneous Ability: An Application to Organ Transplantation
29412.zh_title: 具有异质性能力的羊群行为：在器官移植中的应用
29412.authors: Stephanie C. De Mel, Kaivan Munshi, Soenje Reiche, Hamid Sabourian
29412.abstract: There are many economic environments in which an object is offered sequentially to prospective buyers. It is often observed that once the object for sale is turned down by one or more agents, those that follow do the same. One explanation that has been proposed for this phenomenon is that agents making choices further down the line rationally ignore their own assessment of the object's quality and herd behind their predecessors. Our research adds a new dimension to the canonical herding model by allowing agents to differ in their ability to assess the quality of the offered object. We develop novel tests of herding based on this ability heterogeneity and also examine its efficiency consequences, applied to organ transplantation in the U.K. We find that herding is common but that the information lost due to herding does not substantially increase false discards of good organs or false acceptances of bad organs. Our counter-factual analysis indicates that this is due (in part) to the high degree of heterogeneity in ability across transplant centers. In other settings, such as the U.S., where organ transplantation is organized very differently and the ability distribution will not be the same, the inefficiencies due to herding might well be substantial.
29412.zh_abstract: 在许多经济环境中，一件物品会依次提供给潜在买家。经常观察到，一旦待售物品被一个或多个代理人拒绝，后续的代理人也会这样做。针对这种现象提出的一种解释是，在后续做出选择的代理人理性地忽略自己对物品质量的评估，而跟随其前任。我们的研究通过允许代理人在评估所提供物品质量的能力上存在差异，为经典的羊群行为模型增加了一个新维度。我们基于这种能力异质性开发了新的羊群行为检验，并考察了其效率后果，应用于英国的器官移植。我们发现羊群行为很常见，但由于羊群行为导致的信息损失并未显著增加对好器官的错误丢弃或对坏器官的错误接受。我们的反事实分析表明，这（部分）是由于移植中心之间能力的高度异质性。在其他环境中，例如美国，器官移植的组织方式非常不同，能力分布也会不同，那么羊群行为导致的低效率可能相当大。

29411.title: A Child Support Framework Accounting for Parenting Time and Half-Siblings
29411.zh_title: 考虑探视时间和同父异母/同母异父兄弟姐妹的子女抚养费框架
29411.abstract: In the United States, child support guidelines sometimes generate surprising and presumably unintentional child support amounts, especially in situations with extended visitation, shared parenting, and half-siblings. These are consequences of the ad-hoc mathematical formulas that are in common use to account for such situations. This paper provides ten such surprising examples from ten randomly selected states.\nA child support calculation framework is constructed that takes as inputs the subjective/normative decisions that the public and legislators must make regarding children's expenditures, the progressivity of the contributions between parents, and other matters. Our goal is to derive mathematical formulas for child support amounts that achieve those normative goals while satisfying basic desiderata such as supporting children in both of their families, equity between siblings, neutral medical decisions, and not requiring higher contributions from parents with a lower salary.
29411.zh_abstract: 在美国，子女抚养费指南有时会产生令人惊讶且可能非故意的子女抚养费金额，尤其是在涉及延长探视、共同抚养和同父异母/同母异父兄弟姐妹的情况下。这些是用于处理此类情况的常见临时数学公式的后果。本文提供了来自随机选择的十个州的十个此类令人惊讶的例子。我们构建了一个子女抚养费计算框架，该框架将公众和立法者必须就子女支出、父母之间贡献的累进性以及其他事项做出的主观/规范性决策作为输入。我们的目标是推导出子女抚养费金额的数学公式，这些公式能够实现这些规范性目标，同时满足基本要求，例如支持子女在两个家庭中的生活、兄弟姐妹之间的公平、中立的医疗决策，以及不要求收入较低的父母做出更高贡献。
29411.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE；JEL：I1, I18, J12, J13, K15, K36

29410.title: CLO Performance
29410.authors: Larry Cordell, Michael R. Roberts, Michael Schwert
29410.abstract: We study the performance of collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) to understand the market imperfections giving rise to these vehicles and their corresponding economic costs. CLO equity tranches earn positive abnormal returns from the risk-adjusted price differential between leveraged loans and CLO debt tranches. Debt tranches offer higher returns than similarly rated corporate bonds, making them attractive to banks and insurers that face risk-based capital requirements. Temporal variation in equity performance highlights the resilience of CLOs to market volatility due to their closed-end structure, long-term funding, and embedded options to reinvest principal proceeds.
29410.zh_abstract: 我们研究担保贷款凭证（CLO）的表现，以理解产生这些工具的市场不完善及其相应的经济成本。CLO权益层从杠杆贷款与CLO债务层之间的风险调整价格差异中获得正异常回报。债务层提供的回报高于同等评级的公司债券，这使得它们对面临基于风险的资本要求的银行和保险公司具有吸引力。权益表现的时间变化凸显了CLO由于其中封闭结构、长期融资以及将本金收益再投资的嵌入式期权而对市场波动的韧性。

29409.title: Moment Inequalities and Partial Identification in Industrial Organization
29409.zh_title: 产业组织中的矩不等式与部分识别
29409.authors: Brendan Kline, Ariel Pakes, Elie Tamer
29409.abstract: We review approaches to identification and inference on models in Industrial Organization with partial identification and/or moment inequalities. Often, such approaches are intentionally built directly on assumptions of optimizing behavior that are credible in Industrial Organization settings, while avoiding the use of strong modeling and measurement assumptions that may not be warranted. The result is an identified set for the object of interest, reflecting what the econometrician can learn from the data and assumptions. The chapter formally defines identification, reviews the assumptions underlying the identification argument, and provides examples of their use in Industrial Organization settings. We then discuss the corresponding statistical inference problem paying particular attention to practical implementation issues.
29409.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了在产业组织模型中，针对部分识别和/或矩不等式的识别与推断方法。通常，这些方法直接建立在产业组织情境中可信的优化行为假设之上，同时避免使用可能不合理的强建模和测量假设。其结果是得到感兴趣对象的一个识别集，反映了计量经济学家能从数据和假设中学习到的内容。本章正式定义了识别，回顾了识别论证所依据的假设，并提供了它们在产业组织情境中的应用实例。随后，我们讨论了相应的统计推断问题，特别关注实际实施中的问题。

29469.title: Cooperation in the Commons: Community-based Rangeland Management in Namibia
29469.zh_title: 公地合作：纳米比亚基于社区的牧场管理
29469.authors: D. Layne Coppock, Lucas Crowley, Susan L. Durham, Dylan Groves, Julian C. Jamison, Dean Karlan, Brien E. Norton, R. Douglas Ramsey
29469.abstract: Classic theories suggest that common pool resources are subject to overexploitation. Community-based resource management approaches may ameliorate “tragedy of the commons” effects. Using a randomized evaluation in Namibia’s communal rangelands, we find that a comprehensive four-year program to support community-based rangeland and cattle management led to persistent and large improvements for eight of thirteen indices of social and behavioral outcomes. Effects on rangeland health, cattle productivity and household economics, however, were either negative or nil. Positive impacts on community resource management may have been offset by communities’ inability to control grazing by non-participating herds and inhibited by an unresponsive rangeland sub-system. This juxtaposition, in which measurable improvements in community resource management did not translate into better outcomes for households or rangeland health, demonstrates the fragility of the causal pathway from program implementation to intended socioeconomic and environmental outcomes. It also points to challenges for improving climate change–adaptation strategies.
29469.zh_abstract: 经典理论认为，公共池资源容易遭受过度开发。基于社区的资源管理方法可能改善“公地悲剧”效应。通过在纳米比亚公共牧场进行的一项随机评估，我们发现，一项为期四年的支持社区牧场和牛群管理的综合计划，在13项社会和行为结果指标中的8项上带来了持续且显著的改善。然而，对牧场健康、牛群生产力和家庭经济的影响要么是负面的，要么是无效的。对社区资源管理的积极影响可能被社区无法控制非参与牧群的放牧所抵消，并受到反应迟钝的牧场子系统的抑制。这种社区资源管理的可衡量改善并未转化为家庭或牧场健康的更好结果的并置现象，证明了从项目实施到预期社会经济和环境结果的因果路径的脆弱性。这也指出了改进气候变化适应策略所面临的挑战。
29469.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：O12, O13, P11, Q15, Q24

29468.title: The Hot Hand in the NBA 3-Point Contest: The Importance of Location, Location, Location
29468.zh_title: NBA三分球大赛中的热手效应：位置、位置、位置的重要性
29468.authors: Robert M. Lantis, Erik T. Nesson
29468.abstract: Do basketball players exhibit a hot hand? Results from controlled shooting situations suggest the answer is yes, while results from in-game shooting are mixed. Are the differing results because a hot hand is only present in similar shots or because testing for the hot hand in game situations is difficult? Combining repeated shots in a location and shots across locations, the NBA 3-Point Contests mimics game situations without many of the confounding factors. Using data on the 1986-2019 contests, we find a hot hand, but only within shot locations. Shooting streaks increase a hot hand only if a player makes his previous shot and only within locations. Even making three shots in a row has no effect on making the next shot if a player moves locations. Our results suggest that any hot hand in basketball is only present in extremely similar shooting situations and likely not in the run-of-play.
29468.zh_abstract: 篮球运动员是否存在热手效应？来自受控投篮情境的结果表明答案是肯定的，而来自比赛投篮的结果则好坏参半。结果不同是因为热手效应仅存在于相似投篮中，还是因为在比赛情境中测试热手效应很困难？NBA三分球大赛结合了同一位置的重复投篮和跨位置的投篮，模拟了比赛情境，同时避免了众多混淆因素。利用1986年至2019年比赛的数据，我们发现存在热手效应，但仅限于投篮位置内部。投篮连续命中只有在球员投中上一球时才会增强热手效应，并且仅限于同一位置内。即使连续投中三球，如果球员移动位置，对投中下一球也没有影响。我们的结果表明，篮球中的任何热手效应可能仅存在于极其相似的投篮情境中，很可能不会出现在比赛过程中。

29467.title: Intermediation and Voluntary Exposure to Counterparty Risk
29467.zh_title: 中介化与对交易对手风险的自愿暴露
29467.abstract: I study a model of the financial sector in which intermediation among debt financed banks gives rise to an endogenous core-periphery network – few highly interconnected and many sparsely connected banks. Endogenous intermediation generates excessive systemic risk in the financial network. Financial institutions have incentives to capture intermediation spreads through strategic borrowing and lending decisions. By doing so, they tilt the division of surplus along an intermediation chain in their favor, while at the same time reducing aggregate surplus. The network is inefficient relative to a constrained efficient benchmark since banks who make risky investments “overconnect”, exposing themselves to excessive counterparty risk, while banks who mainly provide funding end up with too few connections.
29467.zh_abstract: 我研究了一个金融部门模型，在该模型中，债务融资银行之间的中介化产生了一个内生的核心-外围网络——少数高度互联的银行和许多稀疏连接的银行。内生中介化在金融网络中产生了过度的系统性风险。金融机构有动机通过战略性借贷决策来获取中介利差。通过这样做，它们使中介链上的剩余分配向有利于自己的方向倾斜，同时减少了总剩余。相对于受约束的有效基准，该网络是低效的，因为进行风险投资的银行“过度连接”，使自身暴露于过度的交易对手风险，而主要提供资金的银行最终拥有的连接过少。

29466.title: AI-tocracy
29466.authors: Martin Beraja, Andrew Kao, David Y. Yang, Noam Yuchtman
29466.abstract: Can frontier innovation be sustained under autocracy? We argue that innovation and autocracy can be mutually reinforcing when: (i) the new technology bolsters the autocrat’s power; and (ii) the autocrat’s demand for the technology stimulates further innovation in applications beyond those benefiting it directly. We test for such a mutually reinforcing relationship in the context of facial recognition AI in China. To do so, we gather comprehensive data on AI firms and government procurement contracts, as well as on social unrest across China during the last decade. We first show that autocrats benefit from AI: local unrest leads to greater government procurement of facial recognition AI, and increased AI procurement suppresses subsequent unrest. We then show that AI innovation benefits from autocrats’ suppression of unrest: the contracted AI firms innovate more both for the government and commercial markets. Taken together, these results suggest the possibility of sustained AI innovation under the Chinese regime: AI innovation entrenches the regime, and the regime’s investment in AI for political control stimulates further frontier innovation.
29466.zh_abstract: 前沿创新能否在专制体制下持续？我们认为，当满足以下条件时，创新与专制可以相互强化：(i) 新技术增强了专制者的权力；(ii) 专制者对技术的需求刺激了超越其直接受益领域的进一步创新应用。我们以中国的人脸识别人工智能为背景，检验了这种相互强化的关系。为此，我们收集了关于人工智能企业和政府采购合同的全面数据，以及过去十年中国各地社会动荡的数据。我们首先表明，专制者从人工智能中受益：地方动荡导致政府采购人脸识别人工智能增加，而人工智能采购的增加抑制了随后的动荡。然后我们表明，人工智能创新从专制者对社会动荡的压制中受益：签约的人工智能企业在政府市场和商业市场上的创新都更多。综合来看，这些结果表明在中国体制下人工智能创新持续存在的可能性：人工智能创新巩固了该体制，而该体制为政治控制而对人工智能的投资刺激了进一步的前沿创新。
29466.meta: Programs：DEV, POL, PR；JEL：E00, L5, L63, O25, O30, O40, P00

29465.title: Office-Based Mental Healthcare and Juvenile Arrests
29465.zh_title: 基于办公室的心理健康护理与青少年逮捕
29465.authors: Monica Deza, Thanh Lu, Johanna Catherine Maclean
29465.abstract: We estimate the effect of local access to office-based mental healthcare on juvenile arrest outcomes. We leverage variation in the number of mental healthcare offices within a county over the period 1999 to 2016 in a two-way fixed-effects model. Office-based treatment is the most common modality of mental healthcare received by juveniles. We find that ten additional office-based mental healthcare providers in a county leads a decrease of 2.3% to 2.6% in the per capita costs to society of juvenile arrest. Findings are similar for arrest rates although often less precise, which suggests that accounting for social costs is empirically important. Crime imposes substantial costs on society and individuals, and interventions during early life can have more pronounced effects than those received at later stages, therefore our results imply increased juvenile access to mental healthcare may have an unintended benefit for the current and future generations.
29465.zh_abstract: 我们估计了本地获得基于办公室的心理健康护理对青少年逮捕结果的影响。我们利用1999年至2016年间一个县内心理健康办公室数量的变化，采用双向固定效应模型进行分析。基于办公室的治疗是青少年接受心理健康护理最常见的方式。我们发现，一个县内每增加十个基于办公室的心理健康服务提供者，青少年逮捕的人均社会成本就会下降2.3%至2.6%。逮捕率的结果类似，尽管通常不那么精确，这表明考虑社会成本在实证上很重要。犯罪给社会和个人带来了巨大成本，而生命早期的干预可能比后期干预效果更显著，因此我们的结果表明，增加青少年获得心理健康护理的机会可能对当前和未来几代人产生意想不到的益处。

29464.title: Trade Competition and the Decline in Union Organizing: Evidence from Certification Elections
29464.zh_title: 贸易竞争与工会组织的衰落：来自认证选举的证据
29464.authors: Kerwin Kofi Charles, Matthew S. Johnson, Nagisa Tadjfar
29464.abstract: The long-term decline in U.S. workers' attempts to organize labor unions accelerated after 2000. We find that the swift rise of imports from China arising from a change in trade policy accounts for nearly all of this post-2000 acceleration: union certification elections decreased substantially among workers in manufacturing industries directly exposed to imports, but also among workers indirectly exposed through their local labor market. Consistent with a simple model of workers' decision to seek union representation, direct exposure lowered the expected wage gain from unionization, whereas indirect exposure increased the cost of job loss - both of which discourage organizing.
29464.zh_abstract: 美国工人试图组织工会的长期下降趋势在2000年后加速。我们发现，由贸易政策变化引起的中国进口迅速增长，几乎解释了2000年后这一加速的全部原因：在直接受进口影响的制造业工人中，工会认证选举大幅减少，而且通过当地劳动力市场间接受到影响的工人中也是如此。与工人寻求工会代表决策的简单模型一致，直接接触降低了工会化的预期工资收益，而间接接触增加了失业成本——这两者都阻碍了组织工会。

29463.title: A Simple Model of Social Distancing and Vaccination
29463.zh_title: 社交距离与疫苗接种的简单模型
29463.abstract: This paper analyzes a simple model of infectious disease where the incentives for individuals to reduce risks through endogenous social distancing take straightforward cost-benefit form. Since disease is transmitted through social interactions, the threat of spread of infection poses a collective action problem. Policy interventions such as lockdowns, testing, and mask-wearing serve, in part, as substitutes for social distancing. Provision of a vaccination is the only intervention that unambiguously reduces both the peak infection level and the herd immunity level of infection. Adoption of vaccination remains limited in a decentralized equilibrium, with resulting reproductive rate of disease Rt > 1 at the conclusion of vaccination. Vaccine mandates yield increases in vaccination rates and corresponding reductions in future infection rates but do not increase expected payoffs to individuals.
29463.zh_abstract: 本文分析了一个简单的传染病模型，其中个体通过内生的社交距离来降低风险的激励具有直接的成本效益形式。由于疾病通过社交互动传播，感染传播的威胁构成了一个集体行动问题。封锁、检测和佩戴口罩等政策干预措施，在一定程度上充当了社交距离的替代品。提供疫苗接种是唯一能明确降低感染峰值水平和感染群体免疫水平的干预措施。在分散均衡中，疫苗接种的采用仍然有限，导致疫苗接种结束时疾病的再生率Rt > 1。疫苗强制令提高了疫苗接种率，并相应降低了未来的感染率，但并未增加个体的预期收益。

29462.title: Depression and Shopping Behavior
29462.abstract: Using a large survey panel that connects household shopping behavior with individual health information, this paper documents correlations between self reported depression and the size and composition of shopping baskets. First, we find that roughly 16% of individuals report suffering from depression and over 30% of households have at least one member who reports suffering from depression. Households with a member suffering from depression exhibit striking differences in shopping behavior: they spend less overall, visit grocery stores less and convenience stores more frequently and spend a smaller share of their baskets on fresh produce and alcohol but a larger share on tobacco. They spend similar shares on unhealthy foods like cakes, candy, and salty snacks. These cross-sectional correlations hold within counties, suggesting that they are not driven by region specific demographics or preferences that are incidentally correlated with depression status. They also hold when considering only single-member households. However, we rule out large differences in shopping behavior within households as they change depression status. Further, using the take-up of antidepressants as an event, we document little change in shopping in response to treatment. With our results, we discuss takeaways for the economic impact of depression and for decision modeling.
29462.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个将家庭购物行为与个人健康信息联系起来的大型调查面板，记录了自我报告的抑郁与购物篮大小及构成之间的相关性。首先，我们发现大约16%的个体报告患有抑郁症，超过30%的家庭至少有一名成员报告患有抑郁症。有成员患有抑郁症的家庭在购物行为上表现出显著差异：他们总体支出更少，去杂货店的频率更低，去便利店的频率更高，并且购物篮中用于新鲜农产品和酒精的份额更小，但用于烟草的份额更大。他们在蛋糕、糖果和咸味零食等不健康食品上的支出份额相似。这些横截面相关性在县内也成立，表明它们并非由与抑郁状态偶然相关的地区特定人口统计特征或偏好所驱动。当仅考虑单人家庭时，这些相关性也成立。然而，我们排除了家庭内部在抑郁状态变化时购物行为存在巨大差异的可能性。此外，利用抗抑郁药物的使用作为事件，我们记录了购物行为在治疗前后几乎没有变化。基于我们的结果，我们讨论了抑郁的经济影响以及决策建模方面的启示。

29461.title: Firm-Level Upgrading in Developing Countries
29461.zh_title: 发展中国家的企业层面升级
29461.abstract: In principle, firms in developing countries benefit from the fact that advanced technologies and products have already been developed in industrialized countries and can simply be adopted, a process often referred to as industrial upgrading. But for many firms this advantage remains elusive. What is getting in the way? This paper reviews recent firm-level empirical research on the determinants of upgrading in developing countries. The first part focuses on how to define and measure various dimensions of upgrading --- learning, quality upgrading, technology adoption, and product innovation. The second part takes stock of recent micro-empirical evidence on the drivers of upgrading, classifying them as output-side drivers, input-side drivers, or drivers of know-how. The review concludes with some thoughts about promising directions for research in the area.
29461.zh_abstract: 原则上，发展中国家的企业受益于这样一个事实：先进技术和产品已在工业化国家开发出来，并且可以直接采用，这一过程通常被称为产业升级。但对许多企业而言，这一优势仍然难以实现。是什么阻碍了它？本文回顾了近期关于发展中国家升级决定因素的企业层面实证研究。第一部分侧重于如何定义和衡量升级的各个维度——学习、质量升级、技术采纳和产品创新。第二部分总结了关于升级驱动因素的近期微观实证证据，将其分类为产出侧驱动因素、投入侧驱动因素或专有技术驱动因素。本文最后对该领域有前景的研究方向提出了一些思考。

29460.title: Salary History and Employer Demand: Evidence from a Two-Sided Audit
29460.zh_title: 薪资历史与雇主需求：来自双向审计的证据
29460.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Bo Cowgill, Laura K. Gee
29460.abstract: We study how salary disclosures affect employer demand using a field experiment featuring hundreds of recruiters and over 2,000 job applications. We randomize the presence of salary questions and the candidates’ disclosures. Employers make negative inferences about non-disclosing candidates, and view salary history as a stronger signal about competing options than worker quality. Disclosures by men (and other highly-paid candidates) yield higher salary offers, but are negative signals of value (net of salary), yielding fewer callbacks. Male wage premiums are regarded as a weaker signal of quality than other wage premiums (such as working at higher paying firms).
29460.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项包含数百名招聘人员和超过2000份求职申请的实地实验，研究薪资披露如何影响雇主需求。我们随机设置了薪资问题的存在与否以及候选人的披露情况。雇主对未披露薪资的候选人做出负面推断，并将薪资历史视为关于竞争性选择的更强信号，而非关于工人质量的信号。男性（以及其他高薪候选人）的披露带来了更高的薪资报价，但却是价值（扣除薪资后）的负面信号，导致更少的回电。男性工资溢价被视为比其他工资溢价（例如在薪酬更高的公司工作）更弱的质量信号。

29459.title: Some Children Left Behind: Variation in the Effects of an Educational Intervention
29459.zh_title: 一些被落下的孩子：教育干预效果的变异
29459.authors: Julie Buhl-Wiggers, Jason T. Kerwin, Juan S. Muñoz-Morales, Jeffrey A. Smith, Rebecca Thornton
29459.abstract: We document substantial variation in the effects of a highly-effective literacy pro-gram in northern Uganda.
